features: Radox Shower Gel Bundle Collection features a luxury shower puff and 4 full-size shower gels that transform the shower experience into a mineral therapy ritual
Radox Feel Awake 2-in-1 Shower Gel & Shampoo 225 ml invigorates the senses with a mood-boosting fragrance of sea minerals and fennel
Radox Feel Radiant Shower Gel 225 ml revives the senses with a refreshing strawberry and raspberry scent
Radox Feel Relaxed Shower Gel 225 ml soothes the senses with a lavender and waterlily scent
Radox Feel Uplifted Shower Gel 225 ml boosts the mood with a stimulating grapefruit and ginger fragrance
This gift set is complemented by a Radox shower puff – an extra gift for a luxurious bath experience
description: Product Description Know someone who could use a little bit of pampering in their life? Brighten their day with the Radox Shower Gel Bundle Collection. This gift set includes a luxury shower puff and 4 full-size shower gels, each made with a unique blend of 4 minerals and 13 herbs that activates with hot water to cleanse and refresh the skin. Radox Feel Awake 2-in-1 Shower Gel & Shampoo combines revitalising sea minerals with the herbal aroma of fennel to awaken your loved one’s senses, while Radox Feel Radiant Shower Gel leaves them feeling revitalised with a crisp strawberry and raspberry scent. Radox Feel Relaxed Shower Gel helps them achieve a blissfully calm state of mind with a soothing lavender and waterlily fragrance. Last but not least, Radox Feel Uplifted boosts their mood with a stimulating ginger and grapefruit scent. From reviving the tired feet of early travellers to helping hardworking people find a moment of solitude and sanctuary, Radox is rooted in the transformative power of mineral therapy. Give the gift of an aromatherapy ritual with this mood-boosting shower gel collection. Designed to revive the body, mind and soul, our gift sets make the perfect gift for any occasion (or a well-deserved treat for yourself). Ingredients Radox Feel Uplifted Shower Gel 225ml INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum, Citric Acid, Sodium Lactate, Tetrasodium EDTA, Calcium Chloride, Maris Sal, Magnesium Sulfate, Limonene, Linalool, CI 16255, CI 17200. Radox Feel Relaxed Shower Gel 225ml INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum, Citric Acid, Tetrasodium EDTA, Maris Sal, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, CI 17200, CI 42090. Radox Feel Radiant Shower Gel 225ml INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Glycol Distearate, Laureth-4, Sodium Lactate, Tetrasodium EDTA, Calcium Chloride, Maris Sal, Magnesium Sulfate, Prunus Cerasus Juice, Rubus Fruticosus Juice, Fragaria Ananassa Fruit Juice, Vaccinium Myrtillus Fruit Juice, Rubus Idaeus Juice, Linalool, CI 17200. Radox Feel Awake Shower Gel 225ml INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Glycerin, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Sodium Lactate, Tetrasodium EDTA, Maris Sal, Calcium Chloride, Magnesium Sulfate, Foeniculum Vulgare Seed Extract, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Linalool, CI 17200, CI 19140, CI 42090 Safety Warning Avoid Contact With Eyes See more
